name: mom_continuous_info_252d
rationale: Information-discreteness / frog-in-the-pan momentum: many same-direction small moves should continue better than lumpy jumps (Da-Gurun-Warachka 2014).

name: risk_parkinson_logrange_20d
rationale: Correct log high-low range variance; fixes the proposal's range-ratio factor mislabeled as Parkinson volatility.

name: risk_gap_vol_20d
rationale: A-share overnight/T+1 gap risk: high close-to-next-open volatility is adverse tradability and crowding risk.

name: liq_roll_spread_low_20d
qlib_expression: 0 - (2 * Power(If(Cov((Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 1) / Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 2) - 1), Ref((Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 1) / Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 2) - 1), 1), 20) < 0, 0 - Cov((Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 1) / Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 2) - 1), Ref((Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 1) / Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 2) - 1), 1), 20), 0), 0.5))
rationale: Roll effective-spread proxy; higher factor value means lower inferred spread / better tradability.

name: liq_zero_ret_ex_susp_20d
rationale: Lesmond-style zero-return illiquidity excluding zero-volume suspension days, reducing contamination from non-trading states.

name: rev_high_turnover_1d
rationale: T+1/retail microstructure: high-turnover selloffs tend to mean-revert faster than quiet selloffs; interaction beats plain rev_return_1d.

name: rev_gap_reversal_1d
rationale: Overnight gap reversal / T+1 inventory pressure; complements the catalog's averaged overnight-return factor.

name: tech_high_breakout_age_250d
rationale: 52-week-high recency: recent high-watermark breakouts are distinct from simple close/high proximity.

name: qual_piotroski_fscore_9pt
qlib_expression: If(Ref($n_income_attr_p_sq_q0, 1) > 0, 1, 0) + If(Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q0, 1) > 0, 1, 0) + If(Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q0, 1) > Ref($n_income_attr_p_sq_q0, 1), 1, 0) + If(Ref($n_income_attr_p_sq_q0, 1) / Ref($total_assets_q0, 1) > Ref($n_income_attr_p_sq_q4, 1) / Ref($total_assets_q4, 1), 1, 0) + If(Ref($total_liab_q0, 1) / Ref($total_assets_q0, 1) < Ref($total_liab_q4, 1) / Ref($total_assets_q4, 1), 1, 0) + If(Ref($total_cur_assets_q0, 1) / Ref($total_cur_liab_q0, 1) > Ref($total_cur_assets_q4, 1) / Ref($total_cur_liab_q4, 1), 1, 0) + If(Ref($total_share, 1) <= Ref($total_share, 251), 1, 0) + If((Ref($total_revenue_sq_q0, 1) - Ref($oper_cost_sq_q0, 1)) / Ref($total_revenue_sq_q0, 1) > (Ref($total_revenue_sq_q4, 1) - Ref($oper_cost_sq_q4, 1)) / Ref($total_revenue_sq_q4, 1), 1, 0) + If(Ref($total_revenue_sq_q0, 1) / Ref($total_assets_q0, 1) > Ref($total_revenue_sq_q4, 1) / Ref($total_assets_q4, 1), 1, 0)
rationale: Piotroski-style profitability, leverage/liquidity/funding, and operating-efficiency score using statement line-items (Piotroski 2000).

name: acc_total_accruals_ttm
qlib_expression: ((Ref($n_income_attr_p_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($n_income_attr_p_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($n_income_attr_p_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($n_income_attr_p_sq_q3, 1)) - (Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q3, 1))) / ((Ref($total_assets_q0, 1) + Ref($total_assets_q4, 1)) / 2)
rationale: Sloan accruals with TTM single-quarter flows over average assets, avoiding cumulative-quarter seasonality.

name: qual_cash_collection_ttm
qlib_expression: (Ref($c_fr_sale_sg_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($c_fr_sale_sg_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($c_fr_sale_sg_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($c_fr_sale_sg_sq_q3, 1)) / (Ref($total_revenue_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($total_revenue_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($total_revenue_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($total_revenue_sq_q3, 1))
rationale: Cash-quality of sales: revenue backed by cash collections should be higher quality than receivable-led growth.

name: acc_inventory_sales_mismatch_yoy
rationale: Inventory buildup faster than sales is a channel-stuffing / demand-quality warning.

name: acc_receivables_sales_mismatch_yoy
rationale: Receivables growing faster than sales indicates aggressive revenue recognition / cash conversion deterioration.

name: val_fcf_ev_ttm
qlib_expression: ((Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($n_cashflow_act_sq_q3, 1)) - (Ref($c_pay_acq_const_fiolta_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($c_pay_acq_const_fiolta_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($c_pay_acq_const_fiolta_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($c_pay_acq_const_fiolta_sq_q3, 1))) / (Ref($total_mv, 1) * 10000 + Ref($total_liab_q0, 1) - Ref($money_cap_q0, 1))
rationale: FCF/EV yield: cashflow value factor using enterprise value rather than equity market cap only.

name: val_ebitda_ev_ttm
rationale: EBITDA/EV yield is easier to rank than EV/EBITDA with negative denominators and uses TTM flows.

name: lev_interest_coverage_ttm
qlib_expression: (Ref($ebit_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($ebit_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($ebit_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($ebit_sq_q3, 1)) / (Ref($fin_exp_int_exp_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($fin_exp_int_exp_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($fin_exp_int_exp_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($fin_exp_int_exp_sq_q3, 1))
rationale: Debt-service quality using financial-expense interest expense rather than bank-style interest expense.

name: earn_forecast_mid_yoy
rationale: A-share forecast/preannouncement midpoint: management-guided earnings growth proxy before full financial statements land.

name: earn_forecast_revision_qoq
rationale: Forecast revision: upward movement in management guidance should be more timely than stale YoY indicator snapshots.

name: earn_forecast_width_confidence
rationale: Narrower forecast interval is higher management-confidence / lower uncertainty, conditional on midpoint.

name: alpha_holder_num_yoy_concentration
rationale: A-share shareholder-base concentration: falling holder count often proxies institutional accumulation / less retail crowding.

name: alpha_holder_num_qoq_concentration
rationale: Shorter-horizon holder-count contraction; screen with YoY version to separate persistent accumulation from reporting noise.

name: limit_up_hit_5d
rationale: Exact limit-board continuation candidate; use actual up_limit to avoid hard-coding 10%/20%/ST bands.

name: limit_down_hit_20d
rationale: Limit-down overhang / trading-interference risk after sell-pressure days.

name: limit_up_distance_1d
rationale: Limit-up magnet/proximity proxy; should be screened separately from actual hit counts.

name: flow_inst_retail_divergence_20d
rationale: Retail-vs-institutional moneyflow divergence: large/extra-large net demand minus small-order net demand.

name: alpha_chip_cost_compression_20d
rationale: Chip-cost compression: concentrated cost basis can precede breakout; use as regime/interaction rather than standalone level.

name: alpha_chip_breakout_pressure
rationale: Price above the 85th-percentile chip cost marks broad holder profitability / breakout pressure beyond cost50 or weight_avg levels.
